work_experience.responsibilities: Crawl data and create a demo customer service AI agent including tool crawler, SQLite, RAG, Groq API.

projects.name: Parking Detection Project
projects.description: Built a real-time parking detection system using YOLOv11n model with Ultralytics. Collected diverse data from multiple sources and used Roboflow to annotate the data.

projects.name: OCR Receipt - Extract text content from invoice image
projects.description: Built a system to extract text content from images, applied extraction to English invoices and taxes. Built an untrained model that can be extended and modified for other versions by changing the dataset.

projects.name: GEC - Gramma Error Correction for Vietnamese document based on sequence to sequence
projects.description: Built a spelling correction system in Vietnamese text based on sequential structure with input-target data. Developed a model based on the pre-trained ViT5 model to identify errors and automatically correct complete sentences according to the sentence generation structure in sequence.

projects.name: DUPR customer service AI Agent - Demo version
projects.description: Built an AI Agent to serve customers in the sports field, specifically Pickleball. Included a data collection tool and AI Agent for customers. Built AI Agent with RAG + LLM, connected to get data from a database, used LangChain to store chat history and called Groq API to create a customer care AI Agent demo.
